name: Squirrel in Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the squirrel pieces overnight in a refrigerator with salted water.
2. Before cooking, remove the squirrel pieces and drain them; pat dry.
3. Place the squirrel pieces in a Crock-Pot along with ham, onion, thyme, and mushrooms.
4. Pour in the beef bouillon and moisten well.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
6. Before serving, turn the heat to High.
7. Combine sour cream, lemon juice, and flour in a bowl.
8. Remove the squirrel pieces to a warm platter.
9. Stir the sour cream mixture into the Crock-Pot.
10. Cook until thickened.
11. Spoon the sauce over the squirrel and sprinkle with parsley.
Serves 6
